summary: Read-only DB-01 post-patch audit of DinoBrain retrieval claims vs dense lexical fallback. Inspected hybrid retrieval implementation, vector index handling, docs, and verification. Found that fallback honesty improved, but hybrid-mode promotion, dense candidate bounding, reranker naming, and retrieval-quality evaluation gates remain too weak to prevent semantic/RAG overclaiming.
decisions: Do not claim lexical_fallback_v2 is semantic embedding retrieval.
Treat current hybrid_contextual_v2 promotion gate as insufficient until vector index provenance, coverage, top-K, and quality canaries are enforced.
Use trace_only because this was a read-only audit.
next_steps: Add strict dense index readiness metadata and validation before reporting hybrid_contextual_v2.
Change dense candidate expansion to scored bounded top-K retrieval.
Expose reranker_mode and avoid calling heuristic boosts a production reranker.
Expand context golden/canary cases to semantic paraphrase, negative, provenance, and lexical-disjoint dense retrieval cases.
